passives.name: Anguish
passives.effects: Every 4 seconds after entering combat with champions, sap all enemy champions around you within 650 units to deal {{as|magic damage}} equal to {{as|3% of your '''bonus''' health}} to them and {{tip|heal}} yourself equal to 250% of the {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} damage dealt.

effects_structured.raw: Every 4s after entering combat, deal magic damage to nearby enemy champions equal to 3% of bonus health (650 range).
Heal for 250% of the post-mitigation damage dealt by this effect.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Anguish begins pulsing after entering champion combat, then resolves every 4 seconds while combat persists.
Execution model: Each pulse damages all enemy champions within 650 units based on bonus health and then heals the holder for 250% of post-mitigation damage dealt.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.name: CommunityDragon items dataset
sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring

sources.name: League Wiki (Unending Despair)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of pulse cadence, radius, bonus-health scaling, and post-mitigation heal conversion semantics
